title: grastidium hamadryas
intro: Grastidium hamadryas, also known as the sticky everlasting daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Grastidium hamadryas include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
